--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KXKJCKH0QW4KVPSWEEXV05WH
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8180'
+title: 'Retrieval-tier migration: rebase MetadataSearcher/MetadataIndex on FoundationModelsRanker''s HybridRanker + RankedDocument and delete the local fusion pipeline'
+---
+## What
+The second half of full Ranker adoption (selection tier is ^exv05wh). `FoundationModelsRanker` extracted this repo's retrieval pipeline â€” its doc comments literally cite `MetadataSearcher.retrievalSearch`/`rankEntireCatalog` and `MetadataIndex.swift`'s build step as the source â€” but this repo never switched over, so ~350 lines of signal computation and RRF fusion in `Sources/FoundationModelsMetadataRegistry/MetadataSearcher.swift` and the per-document precompute in `Sources/FoundationModelsMetadataRegistry/Catalog/MetadataIndex.swift` duplicate what the dependency now owns. Replace the local pipeline with Ranker's and delete the duplicates.
+
+Ranker's API (verified in `../FoundationModelsRanker/Sources/FoundationModelsRanker/`):
+- `RankedDocument(primaryText:bodyText:)` â€” field-for-field identical to `MetadataIndex.Entry`'s hand-rolled precompute (`weightedTermFrequency`, `termSet`, `documentLength`, primary/body trigram sets; primary = id Ă—`BM25.primaryFieldWeight`, body = block Ă—`BM25.bodyFieldWeight`).
+- `HybridRanker.topMatches(ids:documents:query:cosineScores:weights:limit:) -> [Hit]` â€” the `retrievalSearch` shape (only signal-ranked docs, best-first, capped, ascending-index tie-break).
+- `HybridRanker.fullOrdering(ids:documents:query:cosineScores:weights:) -> [Hit]` â€” the `rankEntireCatalog` shape (always `documents.count` hits, unranked docs follow in input order at score 0.0).
+- `SignalWeights(bm25:trigram:cosine:)` â€” identical to the local `Weights` struct (same fields, same 1.0 defaults, same zero-weight-excludes-signal semantics).
+- `CosineScoring.cosineSimilarity(_:_:)` (and vDSP `matvecScores` for batch) â€” identical to the local private `cosineSimilarity`.
+- `Hit`/`Signals` are ALREADY the types `Match.signals` uses via the re-export, so `Hit` â†’ `Match<Item>` mapping is id lookup only.
+
+What stays local (deliberately â€” Ranker's `Searcher` does NOT replace `MetadataSearcher`): the typed `SearchableMetadata`/`Match<Item>` surface, hot reload with hash-guarded incremental re-embedding and overlapping-update merge (`incrementalBaseline`/`mergingEmbeddings` â€” Ranker's `Searcher` embeds only at init), and the `MetadataDiagnostic` channel. Cosine gating also stays local: `HybridRanker` skips cosine silently when `cosineScores` is nil, so the `.embeddingUnavailable` reporting and the zero-weight skip remain `MetadataSearcher`'s job.
+
+Subtasks:
+- [ ] `MetadataIndex.Entry`: store one `RankedDocument(primaryText: item.id, bodyText: block)` instead of the five hand-rolled fields; expose `rankedDocument(forID:)` (or an `ids`-aligned array accessor) and delete the now-redundant public lookups `weightedTermFrequency(forID:)`, `termSet(forID:)`, `documentLength(forID:)`, `idTrigramSet(forID:)`, `blockTrigramSet(forID:)`
+- [ ] `MetadataSearcher.retrievalSearch(intent:limit:)` â†’ `HybridRanker.topMatches`, and `rankEntireCatalog(...)` â†’ `HybridRanker.fullOrdering`, mapping each `Hit` to `Match<Item>` via `index.item(forID:)`/`block(forID:)`
+- [ ] Cosine path: embed the query, compute per-document scores with `CosineScoring.cosineSimilarity`, pass as `cosineScores:` â€” keeping the existing guards (`nil` embedder / no embedded items / embed failure â†’ `cosineScores: nil` + `.embeddingUnavailable`; `weights.cosine == 0` â†’ skip without diagnostic)
+- [ ] Replace the local `Weights` struct with `public typealias Weights = SignalWeights` (identical shape) so the three public initializers keep their signatures
+- [ ] Delete the dead private machinery in `MetadataSearcher.swift` â€” `RetrievalSignals`, `computeSignals`, `computeBM25Ranking`, `computeTrigramRanking`, `computeCosineRanking`, `cosineSimilarity`, `fuseAndNormalize`, `sortByNormalizedScore`, `rankingOfPositiveScores`, `zeroScoresArray`, `buildMatches`, `embeddingUnavailableRanking` â€” and update `plan.md` Â§5's superseded note to record that fusion now runs through `HybridRanker`
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `grep -n "RRF.fuse\|BM25Corpus\|Trigram.dice\|canonicalTrigramSet" Sources/FoundationModelsMetadataRegistry/` returns no hits â€” no local signal computation or fusion remains; the only ranking entry points called are `HybridRanker.topMatches`/`HybridRanker.fullOrdering`
+- [ ] The golden rankings in `Tests/FoundationModelsMetadataRegistryTests/RetrievalSearchTests.swift` pass UNCHANGED (no expected-value edits) â€” behavior parity, including id-field weighting, `[0,1]` normalization, zero-weight signal exclusion, and deterministic tie-breaks
+- [ ] Cosine degradation parity: `--no-embedder`-style searches still emit `.embeddingUnavailable` exactly once per search and rank keyword-only (existing `EmbeddingTests`/`ExamplesSmokeTests` assertions pass unchanged)
+- [ ] `rankEntireCatalog` parity for the over-budget selection path: `OverBudgetTests` assertions on candidate count (`min(candidateLimit, index.count)`) and ordering pass unchanged
+- [ ] Public API is source-compatible: the three `MetadataSearcher` initializers and `Match<Item>` are unchanged; `Weights(bm25:trigram:cosine:)` still constructs (as the `SignalWeights` typealias)
+- [ ] `plan.md` Â§5 note updated
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] Update only test *internals* that referenced deleted `MetadataIndex` lookups (`CatalogTests.swift` term/trigram assertions move to `rankedDocument(forID:)`'s fields) â€” golden ranking expectations in `RetrievalSearchTests.swift` must not change
+- [ ] Add one test in `Tests/FoundationModelsMetadataRegistryTests/RetrievalSearchTests.swift` asserting `Match.signals` equals the `Hit.signals` Ranker computed for the same query/fixture (guards the Hitâ†’Match mapping)
+- [ ] Run `swift test` â€” all suites pass GPU-free (98+ tests), including `HotReloadTests` (incremental re-embed untouched) and `ExamplesSmokeTests` (BigCatalog ~10Âł-entry timing path)
+- [ ] `swift build` compiles all Examples targets
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` â€” write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
+
+Depends on ^exv05wh (selection-tier migration) â€” both rewrite `MetadataSearcher.swift`; serializing avoids conflicting edits. Sizing: two substantive implementation files (`MetadataIndex.swift`, `MetadataSearcher.swift`), the rest is deletion of the duplicated pipeline and test-internal updates â€” one concern.
\ No newline at end of file
